titleStmt.title: SII 8.484: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 484. (A.R. No. 185 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH AND EAST BASES OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābdam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟuiraṇṭil mel cellāniṉṟa sātāraṇasamvat sara ttu mituṉanāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu trayodeśi yum veḷḷikkiḻamaipeṟṟa rocaṇināḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrnāṭṭu tirukkāḷattiāṉa mummuṭicoḻapurattu nāyaṉār tirukkāḷattiuṭaiyanāyaṉārkku naṭuvilmaṇṭalattu tirumuṉaippā(ṇ)ṭi kiḻāmūrnāṭṭu tirumurpaṟṟu paṉaippākkattu maruttuvaṉ tūḷiāḻvāṉ periyauṭaiyāṉeṉ nāyaṉār
tirukkāḷattiuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattil kāṇiyāṉa Āṟṟūrnāṭṭu tirukkāḷattipputtūril Ellaiyil śrīpaṇṭārattukku nāṉ paṇam kuṭuttu koṇṭa piccar toṭṭattukku vaṭakkum tatimiciyāciyaṉāyaṉār toṭṭattukku meṟku pottarāṇṭār toṭṭattukku teṟku vatikku teṟku puttūr nattat vatikku teṉkiḻakku nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nilam vilaikku Uṟakkoṇṭu Inta nāyaṉārkku tirunaṉtavaṉamāka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Ōraṇait tirumālai nāyaṉār cāttukaikkum Eṉperāle
vaikkum taṇṇirpantalum cantarātittavarai celvatākavum Inta tirunaṉtavaṉam payiṟceykaikkum taṇṇirpantal vaikkaikkum tirumalaimā heśvara ril tiruvampalattu kayilāyamuṭaiyārum Ivar vaṟkattārum Inta tirunaṉtavaṉam kaiykkoṇṭu Upaiyamāka nicceyittu cantirātittavarai celvatāka kuṭutteṉ Inta tirunaṉtavaṉam Inta pramā ṇappaṭi Ellaimuṟṟum kaiy cantirātittavarai Upaiyamāka kaikkoṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oraṇait tirumālaiyum Inta taṇṇirpantalum tāḻvaṟa naṭattakkaṭaveṉākavum Upaiyamāka kaiykkoṇṭeṉ tirumalaimā heśvara ril tiruvam(m)palattuThe record is incomplete by a few letters at the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.484 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
